'''Groola''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and owner of [[Groola's Place]]. He insisted that he was not a typical representative of the Hutts. He arrived on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] five years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and reopened an old, closed-down bar which he named Groola's Place, he turned it into a large underground complex. Local rumors say that Groola won the bar in a game of chance somewhere offplanet.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Char-stub}}
